reset_biology_synthesis.recommendation: Hunter Williams — cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300 (2026-03-29, 18:52): "I would say in terms of heart health or blood pressure or anything along those lines, this would be one of my first line defenses." https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300/
reset_biology_synthesis.caveats:
- Hunter Williams — cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300 (2026-03-29, 11:41): "this is a rodent model, so we can't always translate, but You have rats, they're induced with art attack." https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300/
- Hunter Williams — cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300 (2026-03-29, 13:46): "we just don't have any data in pregnant or breastfeeding women." https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300/
- Hunter Williams — cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300 (2026-03-29, 18:20): "This isn' something that you wanna run continuously throughout the year. You definitely wanna do it in 30, 60 or 90 day cycles tops and then come on atleast for the amount of time that your off." https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300/
- Hunter Williams — cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300 (2026-03-29, 8:17): "You've got to look at diet and lifestyle and training and what you're eating." https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300/

chronic.dose: Hunter Williams — cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300 (2026-03-29, 16:04): "what you typically do is around one to two milligrams for injection. You could also go a little bit higher. Some people would even do five milligrams per week split into two, 2.5 milligram doses and do that for four weeks." https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300/ Hunter Williams — cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300 (2026-03-29, 16:38): "I'd do two milligrams a day for 30 days." https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300/ Hunter Williams — cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300 (2026-03-29, 16:38): "you could probably get away with one milligram a day for 30 days and then do that maybe twice a year and I think that would cover your bases." https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300/ Hunter Williams — cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300 (2026-03-29, 16:38–17:13): "for someone with a heart attack or stroke that they have worked on, two milligrams to five milligrams per day and do that for 60 days and two to three times per year." https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300/ Hunter Williams — saturday-morning-coffee-talk-72625--1e352582 (2026-04-08, 1:54:57): "Two milligrams of both of those a day I think would a good start, Willie." https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/saturday-morning-coffee-talk-72625--1e352582/
chronic.route: Hunter Williams — cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300 (2026-03-29, 16:38): "And you are just going to inject subcutaneously. You could either do the morning or the night. It doesn't really matter." https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300/ Hunter Williams — cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300 (2026-03-29, 14:51): "typical regimen if you're using the capsules is one in the morning one In the evening for 30 days, so you would do that usually repeat two to three times a year Depending on the severity of The issue you are treating" https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300/
chronic.frequency: Hunter Williams — cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300 (2026-03-29, 16:38): "I'd do two milligrams a day for 30 days. And then I would cycle that two to three times per year." https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300/ Hunter Williams — cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300 (2026-03-29, 16:38): "you could probably get away with one milligram a day for 30 days and then do that maybe twice a year and I think that would cover your bases." https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300/
chronic.duration: Hunter Williams — cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300 (2026-03-29, 17:46): "typically what your going to use, use this for at least 30 days. Like I said, if it's more severe, you'd go up to 60 and maybe even 90 days, but you want to give it at least that long to really see any changes." https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300/ Hunter Williams — cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300 (2026-03-29, 18:20): "If you're on for 30 days, I recommend longer, but at least 30 days off. If you were on for 60 days, take atleast 60 day off, and if you're on 90 days take 90 day's off and the effects are going to be cumulative over time." https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300/
chronic.verbatim_citation: Hunter Williams — cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300 (2026-03-29, 16:04): "what you typically do is around one to two milligrams for injection." https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/cardiogen-the-game-changing-peptide-for-heart-health-longevity--8f726300/

structured_regimens.speaker: Hunter Williams
structured_regimens.quote: what you typically do is around one to two milligrams for injection. You could also go a little bit higher. Some people would even do five milligrams per week split into two, 2.5 milligram doses and do that for four weeks.

structured_regimens.speaker: Hunter Williams
structured_regimens.quote: I'd do two milligrams a day for 30 days.

structured_regimens.speaker: Hunter Williams
structured_regimens.quote: you could probably get away with one milligram a day for 30 days and then do that maybe twice a year and I think that would cover your bases.

structured_regimens.speaker: Hunter Williams
structured_regimens.quote: for someone with a heart attack or stroke that they have worked on, two milligrams to five milligrams per day and do that for 60 days and two to three times per year.

structured_regimens.speaker: Hunter Williams
structured_regimens.quote: Two milligrams of both of those a day I think would a good start, Willie.

structured_regimens.speaker: Hunter Williams
structured_regimens.quote: And you are just going to inject subcutaneously. You could either do the morning or the night. It doesn't really matter.

structured_regimens.speaker: Hunter Williams
structured_regimens.quote: typical regimen if you're using the capsules is one in the morning one In the evening for 30 days, so you would do that usually repeat two to three times a year Depending on the severity of The issue you are treating

structured_regimens.speaker: Hunter Williams
structured_regimens.quote: I'd do two milligrams a day for 30 days. And then I would cycle that two to three times per year.

structured_regimens.speaker: Hunter Williams
structured_regimens.quote: you could probably get away with one milligram a day for 30 days and then do that maybe twice a year and I think that would cover your bases.

structured_regimens.speaker: Hunter Williams
structured_regimens.quote: typically what your going to use, use this for at least 30 days. Like I said, if it's more severe, you'd go up to 60 and maybe even 90 days, but you want to give it at least that long to really see any changes.

structured_regimens.speaker: Hunter Williams
structured_regimens.quote: If you're on for 30 days, I recommend longer, but at least 30 days off. If you were on for 60 days, take atleast 60 day off, and if you're on 90 days take 90 day's off and the effects are going to be cumulative over time.
